Cheatsheet

Complexity Analysis

Complexity Analysis Cheatsheet

cpp
    **🧠 Memory Aid:** O(1) < O(log n) < O(n) < O(n log n) < O(n²) < O(2ⁿ) < O(n!).  Ask: what is n? What loop structure drives the complexity?

📖 Big-O Notation

cpp
   `// O(1): Hash lookup, array index

// O(log n): Binary search, BST ops // O(n): Single loop, linear scan // O(n log n): Merge sort, heap sort // O(n²): Nested loops, bubble sort`
